server.name: sage-kernel
server.description: MCP control surface for Sage Kernel OS.

tools.name: kernel.phase.status
tools.description: List kernel phase status.
tools.outputShape: Array of kernel phase records with id, name, status, goal, and completion criteria.
failureModes: Catalog phase file is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.catalog.search
tools.description: Search repos, modules, templates, integrations, and phases.
tools.outputShape: Array of matching catalog entries grouped by kind and original item payload.
failureModes: Catalog JSON files are missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.template.list
tools.description: List available project templates and QA profile mappings.
tools.outputShape: Array of template records with coverage, stack, and QA profile metadata.
failureModes: Template catalog is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.project.plan
tools.description: Create a project plan from a template, deployment target, QA profile, and infra profile.
tools.outputShape: Project plan object containing template, target, QA profile, infra plan, and next steps.

tools.name: kernel.project.scaffold
tools.description: Scaffold a local project skeleton from a kernel template.
tools.outputShape: Scaffold result with output path and generated file list.
failureModes: Output path is invalid or not writable.

tools.name: kernel.profile.detect
tools.description: Detect the project type, stack, SDLC profile, tests, CI, database, deployment, and evidence for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Project profile detection report with primary profile, secondary profiles, languages, frameworks, tests, CI, deployment, databases, evidence, and warnings.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.done.generate
tools.description: Generate a machine-checkable definition of done from project profile, objective, and risk level.
tools.outputShape: Definition-of-done object with acceptance criteria, required checks, commands, evidence, rollback requirement, and stop conditions.

examples.description: Generate high-risk done criteria for the active project.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.plan
tools.description: Create a closed-loop SDLC workflow plan from the detected project profile, objective, and risk level.
tools.outputShape: Closed-loop workflow object with phases, commands, evidence, stop conditions, rollback expectation, and next actions.

examples.description: Plan a high-risk closed loop for the active project.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.run
tools.description: Execute the allowlisted closed-loop SDLC verification commands for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Closed-loop workflow execution with command results and next actions.

examples.description: Run a low-risk closed loop for the active project.

failureModes: One or more verification commands fail.
Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.validate
tools.description: Validate the built-in closed-loop workflow engine contract.
tools.outputShape: Validation report for closed-loop workflow structure and required gates.

tools.name: kernel.loop.prove
tools.description: Run deterministic proof fixtures for the closed-loop workflow engine.
tools.outputShape: Proof report for planned, dry-run, and runner-backed closed-loop workflows.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.validate
tools.description: Validate the canonical state-machine workflow engine definition used by CLI, MCP, and dashboard controls.
tools.outputShape: Workflow engine validation report with status, state coverage, checked step count, and failures.

examples.description: Validate the built-in workflow engine definition.

failureModes: A command-required step is missing a command.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.prove
tools.description: Run the deterministic workflow engine fixture that fails, repairs through a bounded retry, and passes.
tools.sideEffects: creates a temporary fixture project and runs npm test inside it
tools.outputShape: Workflow engine proof report with before failure, repaired workflow run, after pass, audit trail, and repair evidence.
failureModes: The controlled failing test does not fail before repair.
The repaired fixture test does not pass.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.run
tools.description: Run a caller-provided state-machine workflow definition with retries, approvals, rollback, and audit records.
tools.sideEffects: runs local workflow commands declared by the provided workflow definition
tools.outputShape: Workflow execution report with final status, state, validation, step results, repairs, rollback entries, audit trail, and next actions.

examples.description: Run a read-only inspect and review workflow.

failureModes: A workflow command fails after retry budget.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.summary
tools.description: Summarize the connected AI Warehouse inventory.
tools.outputShape: AI Warehouse summary with inventory counts and maturity/category breakdowns.
failureModes: Warehouse index is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.search
tools.description: Search the AI Warehouse index for tools, categories, tags, and verdicts.
tools.outputShape: Array of AI Warehouse tool matches with slug, name, verdict, maturity, tags, and summary.
failureModes: Warehouse index is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.qa.profile
tools.description: Return the QA profile for a template.
tools.outputShape: QA profile object for the requested template, including commands and gates.

tools.name: kernel.qa.plan
tools.description: Plan QA gates for a template without executing them.
tools.outputShape: QA execution plan with selected profile, mode, checks, and commands without executing them.

tools.name: kernel.qa.run
tools.description: Run safe local QA for the kernel or a generated project.
tools.outputShape: Signed QA report with project path, mode, status, checks, timestamps, and signature.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.
Project package or required files are missing.

tools.name: kernel.repo.inspect
tools.description: Inspect a cataloged source repo without mutating it.
tools.outputShape: Repository inspection with existence, package metadata, readme preview, and source path.
failureModes: Repo is not in the catalog.

tools.name: kernel.infra.plan
tools.description: Return an infrastructure plan for a template and deploy target.
tools.outputShape: Infrastructure plan with deploy target, environment requirements, readiness checks, and rollback notes.

tools.name: kernel.deploy.prepare
tools.description: Prepare a deploy readiness plan with QA, infra, env, rollback, and approval gates.
tools.outputShape: Deploy readiness object combining QA gates, infra plan, environment checks, rollback, and approval requirements.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.list
tools.description: List local safe jobs and approval boundaries.
tools.outputShape: Array of job definitions with id, risk, schedule, approval boundary, and steps.
failureModes: Job registry is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.run
tools.description: Run a local safe job and write run history.
tools.outputShape: Job run summary with run id, job id, status, duration, path, and step results.
failureModes: Signed approval is missing or invalid.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.runs
tools.description: List recent local job runs.
tools.outputShape: Array of recent job run summaries with status, duration, timestamp, and path.
failureModes: Run history directory or database rows are unreadable.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.enqueue
tools.description: Enqueue a durable local job in SQLite.
tools.outputShape: Queued job record with id, job id, status, priority, payload, attempts, and next run time.

tools.name: kernel.worker.tick
tools.description: Run one durable worker queue tick.
tools.sideEffects: runs one local queued job if ready
tools.outputShape: Worker tick result showing claimed job, execution status, and queue transition.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.request
tools.description: Record an approval request in the local approval ledger.
tools.outputShape: Approval record with id, action, status, reason, payload, and creation timestamp.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.list
tools.description: List approval ledger entries.
tools.outputShape: Array of approval records filtered by optional status.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.approve
tools.description: Approve and sign a pending approval request in the local approval ledger.
tools.sideEffects: writes signed local SQLite approval state
tools.outputShape: Signed approval record with approved status, decidedBy, decidedAt, and signature.

tools.name: kernel.dashboard.snapshot
tools.description: Return DB-backed dashboard state for the live command center.
tools.outputShape: Dashboard snapshot with version, health, DB counts, approvals, jobs, repos, templates, artifacts, and metrics inputs.
failureModes: Catalog files are missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.index_project
tools.description: Build a bounded read-only semantic index for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Semantic index with adapter metadata, module summaries, extracted symbols, and bounded reference terms.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.search_symbol
tools.description: Search detected symbols in the bounded local semantic index.
tools.outputShape: Symbol search result with query, count, and matching symbol records.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.find_references
tools.description: Find bounded text references for a symbol or term in the local semantic index.
tools.outputShape: Reference search result with file, line, and trimmed text for each hit.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.summarize_module
tools.description: Summarize one module using the local semantic analyzer.
tools.outputShape: Module summary with language, line count, symbols, imports, exports, and a short generated summary.
failureModes: File path is outside the kernel root.
Module file is missing or unreadable.

tools.name: kernel.adapters.list
tools.description: List built-in and optional external adapters with discovery status, capabilities, and install hints.
tools.outputShape: Adapter discovery report with status summary, capabilities, mutation policy, permission, configured environment keys, and install hints.
failureModes: Optional adapter catalog is missing or malformed.
Configured adapter command is missing from PATH.
Optional adapter is intentionally disabled by environment.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.list
tools.description: List validated local runbooks for daily engineering operations.
tools.outputShape: Runbook catalog with ids, titles, risk, approval requirement, steps, and verification commands.
failureModes: Runbook catalog JSON is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.plan_day
tools.description: Generate a local daily engineering plan grounded in phases, evals, runbooks, and memory.
tools.outputShape: Daily plan with objective, phase, risks, steps, gates, and evidence summary.
failureModes: Catalog phase file is missing or malformed.
Eval report is missing, producing a needs_attention plan.
Memory store cannot initialize, producing fallback evidence.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.generate_adr
tools.description: Generate an Architecture Decision Record draft without executing commands.
tools.outputShape: ADR object with id, title, status, markdown, and optional root-bounded output path.
failureModes: Output path is outside the project root.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.execute_step
tools.description: Execute one allowlisted runbook step with signed approval, timeout, rollback metadata, and audit records.
tools.sideEffects: may execute allowlisted local commands and writes audit/artifact records
tools.outputShape: Runbook step execution result with status, command, timeout, duration, stdout/stderr excerpts, rollback metadata, and audit record.

examples.description: Plan a runbook step without executing it.

failureModes: Signed approval is missing or invalid for execution.
Runbook or step id is unknown.
Command is not in the runbook execution allowlist.
Step command times out or exits non-zero.

tools.name: kernel.dogfood.prod
tools.description: Audit three production repos against kernel QA readiness without mutating them.
tools.outputShape: Dogfood audit report with configured source root, targets, checks, QA status, and failed QA checks.
failureModes: QA report is malformed or failed.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.audit_repo
tools.description: Audit the active project and return QA status, dashboard health, pending approvals, and next actions.
tools.sideEffects: runs local QA commands and may write local audit records
tools.outputShape: Daily audit report with QA result, dashboard health summary, pending approval count, and next actions.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.run_full_qa
tools.description: Run a full QA workflow against a project path and summarize failures.
tools.sideEffects: runs local QA commands and may write local audit records
tools.outputShape: Full QA workflow report with mode, QA status, failed checks, and next actions.

examples.description: Run standard QA on the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.explain_failures
tools.description: Explain failed checks from a QA report or by running a fast local QA pass.
tools.outputShape: Failure explanation with failed check names, command output excerpts, and recommended rerun steps.

examples.description: Explain a provided failed QA report.

failureModes: Fallback QA run fails before producing JSON.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.create_app
tools.description: Create a production-ready app from a Sage Kernel template and return next steps.
tools.outputShape: Create-app workflow result with template plan, scaffold output, status, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.release_readiness
tools.description: Check local release readiness from deployment plan, dashboard health, and approval state.
tools.outputShape: Release readiness report with deployment plan, checks, status, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.pending_approvals
tools.description: Show pending approval requests with review guidance.
tools.outputShape: Approval inbox report with status filter, count, approval records, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.stress_dashboard
tools.description: Stress test the local dashboard or health endpoint and return latency/failure metrics.
tools.outputShape: Dashboard stress report with request count, concurrency, failures, throughput, and latency percentiles.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.daily_summary
tools.description: Summarize today's kernel state for daily app-building work.
tools.outputShape: Daily summary with dashboard health, DB counts, tool count, pending approvals, recent runs, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.agents.list
tools.description: List installed source agent profiles from the Sage global agent pack.
tools.outputShape: Agent profile list with id, title, source path, byte size, and content hash.
failureModes: Agent manifest is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.agents.validate
tools.description: Validate the source global agent pack and SDLC profile coverage.
tools.outputShape: Validation report with status, coverage counts, and failures.

tools.name: kernel.agents.doctor
tools.description: Check whether the Sage global agent pack is installed into the active user home.
tools.outputShape: Doctor report with source pack, global file, manifest, and installed profile checks.
failureModes: One or more installed profiles are missing.

tools.name: kernel.agents.install_global
tools.description: Install the Sage global agent pack into the active user home with backup handling.
tools.sideEffects: writes AGENTS.md and profile files under the selected user home
tools.outputShape: Install result with target path, manifest path, profile directory, and backup paths.

tools.name: kernel.agent.roles
tools.description: List executable agent roles, missions, allowed tools, forbidden actions, and policies.
tools.outputShape: Executable agent role catalog with bounded permissions, quality checklist, memory policy, and approval policy.

tools.name: kernel.agent.validate
tools.description: Validate executable agent role manifests and policy coverage.
tools.outputShape: Agent runtime validation report with role count, required-role coverage, policy coverage, and failures.
failureModes: A role is missing permissions, policies, or quality checklist.

tools.name: kernel.agent.run
tools.description: Run one bounded read-only agent against a project and return evidence-backed findings and scorecard inputs.
tools.outputShape: Agent task result with role metadata, project evidence, findings, permission policy, and next actions.

examples.description: Run the reviewer agent against the active repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.agent.eval
tools.description: Run deterministic evals for executable agent role contracts, task execution, and council review.
tools.outputShape: Agent eval report with pass/fail status for role contracts, agent execution, and council review.

tools.name: kernel.council.review
tools.description: Run multiple bounded agent roles and merge their findings into one engineering council decision.
tools.outputShape: Council review result with per-agent results, scorecards, deduplicated severity-ranked findings, decision, and next actions.

examples.description: Run the default engineering council against the active repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.inspect_repo
tools.description: Inspect a project for scripts, docs, tests, CI, package metadata, and engineering surfaces.
tools.outputShape: Repository inspection summary with project metadata, counts, scripts, docs, CI, surfaces, and findings.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.architecture_audit
tools.description: Score architecture readiness from detected project surfaces and structure.
tools.outputShape: Architecture category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.clean_code_audit
tools.description: Score clean-code readiness from scripts, file size signals, and validation coverage.
tools.outputShape: Clean-code category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.test_audit
tools.description: Score testing readiness from test files, test scripts, coverage gates, and E2E signals.
tools.outputShape: Testing category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.security_audit
tools.description: Score security readiness from policy docs, security scripts, and audit signals.
tools.outputShape: Security category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.quality_score
tools.description: Create a full senior engineering quality score report for a project.
tools.outputShape: Inspection plus validated review report with architecture, clean-code, testing, security, and release scores.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.release_proof
tools.description: Create a release-proof review report with expected command evidence references.
tools.outputShape: Release-proof review report with release evidence, score, remaining work, and status.

examples.description: Create release proof for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.drift.map
tools.description: Create a drift map for scope, architecture, routes, MCP tools, docs, tests, and permissions.
tools.outputShape: Drift map with architecture directories, MCP parity counts, dashboard routes, docs, tests, permissions, and findings.
failureModes: MCP manifest or dispatcher files are malformed.

tools.name: kernel.drift.scope
tools.description: Detect scope creep against allowed repository areas, denied patterns, and test-coverage expectations.
tools.outputShape: Scope report with inspected files, allowed scopes, denied patterns, and blocking findings.
failureModes: Git status is unavailable and filesystem fallback cannot be scanned.
Denied files are present in the inspected scope.

tools.name: kernel.drift.self_audit
tools.description: Compare implementation against generated docs, MCP contracts, package scripts, release gates, and permissions.
tools.outputShape: Self-audit report with parity checks for MCP dispatcher, contracts, docs, permissions, scripts, and release gates.
failureModes: Generated docs or contracts are stale.
Permission guard does not match MCP risk metadata.

tools.name: kernel.drift.proof
tools.description: Run the complete drift proof by combining drift map, scope-creep detection, and self-audit checks.
tools.outputShape: Complete drift proof with status, map, scope report, self-audit report, findings, and remaining work.

examples.description: Prove the repo has not drifted from its control-plane contracts.

failureModes: Any drift map, scope, contract, documentation, or permission check has a blocking finding.
